g.title: Viewport background, two panel frames, header + footer bands
g.text: KIOSK-008 · map marker + track rendering (three-fix tail baseline + selection polyline) · 2026-05-19 · single-design v1a
Lab fixture 800x480 × 2 stacked panels · ADR-015-pending substrate per README.md:36 · five values are mockup-render-only — see rationale
Panel A — MultiTag baseline (Selection::None) · three-fix tail where eligible
Panel B — same scenario with Selection::Tag(1) · tag-1 tail replaced by full polyline

Palette: tools/sarcom-kiosk-lab/src/ui/palette.rs · BLUE #32b4ff (Fresh) · ORANGE #f0a030 (Aging/relay) · GREEN #40d080 (gateway) · RED #ff3c3c (SOS) · freshness_color(Stale)=rgb(180,83,9) per markers.rs:40-48

Source of truth: KIOSK-008 ticket Scope (l.50-91) · Decisions pinned (l.198-222) #4 SOS=no tail · #7 polyline=tag colour @ 0.5 · #8 freshness_color consistency · data.rs:131-150 (TagData.track at :142) · markers.rs:32-48, 216-227, 265-302 · pmtiles_map.rs:82-125, 161-202

Map chrome: scale bar + compass rose only (tickets/README.md:26, KIOSK-001:16, 31). No floating buttons. No crosshair (KIOSK-002 deferred per tickets/README.md:53, 85). No coord readout. Strict ADR-007 per tickets/README.md:14-33.

g.title: Panel A map area 480x426 at x=20..500, y=90..516. Three layers in z-order per pmtiles_map.rs:82-125: PMTiles basemap + LIDAR hillshade @ 0.5 + OSM XML overlays. KIOSK-008 tail dots paint inside Map::show closure after L3 and before the current-position dots / SOS pulse rings.

Panel A markers + KIOSK-008 tails. Tails paint after L3 basemap and before current dots / SOS pulse. SOS tag = NO tail (Decisions pinned #4). No-fix ghost = NO tail. Stale tag = per-state colour from freshness_color (Decisions pinned #8). Tag positions are illustrative; data model is data.rs:131-150 (TagData) with track Vec at :142.
Panel A sidebar abstracted — KIOSK-003 owns row layout, KIOSK-004 owns detail surface. KIOSK-008 is about the map render side. No row is selected in Panel A (Selection::None).
g.text: tag-3 · NO FIX · last fix 4 m

g.title: Existing non-SOS strip per app.rs:283-344. KIOSK-006 owns the SOS-active state. Here SOS is active for tag-2; KIOSK-008 mockup keeps it minimal — the SOS strip is illustrated by KIOSK-006, not redrawn here.
g.text: DISTRESS · tag-2 · 3 s · ack at tag
(SOS strip rendered for context · owned by KIOSK-006)

g.title: Panel A map chrome — compass rose + scale bar only per tickets/README.md:26, KIOSK-001:16, 31. No zoom +/-, no fit-all, no home, no clear-UI, no crosshair.

Panel B map area 480x426 at x=20..500, y=610..1036. Same three-layer basemap as Panel A. Selection::Tag(1) — tag-1 baseline three-fix tail is REPLACED by the full polyline through every fix in TagData.track (data.rs:142). Style: tag colour BLUE at opacity 0.5 (Decisions pinned #7). Other tags retain baseline behaviour.

Panel B markers. tag-1 selected: full polyline through TagData.track replaces three-fix tail, tag colour BLUE at opacity 0.5 (Decisions pinned #7), thicker stroke (mockup-render-only stroke-width=2). Selection halo around current dot per markers.rs:231-237. tag-2/3/4 unchanged from Panel A.
Panel B sidebar abstracted — selected row tag-1 highlighted (Selection::Tag(1)). Actual sidebar detail-replacement is KIOSK-004's surface; this mockup is about the map render side.
g.text: 12 s · fresh · full track on map
(other rows hidden during detail per KIOSK-004 sidebar replacement)

g.title: Panel B SOS strip same as Panel A — SOS persists across selection. KIOSK-006 owns the strip; KIOSK-008 makes no change to it.
g.text: DISTRESS · tag-2 · 3 s · ack at tag

g.title: Panel B map chrome — same as Panel A. Strict chrome budget unchanged by selection: compass rose + scale bar only.
Marginal callouts. L1/L2/L3 anchor each basemap layer; numbered callouts tie each tag's tail/no-tail decision to its source-of-truth.
g.text: Three-fix baseline tail per eligible tag
tail + current dot both render in
when one tag is selected — AC#5
no follow mode · no speed labels
